name: Currencycloud (Visa) FX & Cross-Border Payments API
what_it_does: Currencycloud REST API (Visa subsidiary) for FX and cross-border B2B payment infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage multi-currency accounts and payment routing, handle FX rate quotes and conversion execution, access international payment sending to 180+ countries, retrieve settlement and reconciliation data, manage beneficiary and bank detail management, handle payment tracking and status monitoring, access FX risk management and rate locking, retrieve transaction reporting and compliance data, manage collection accounts for receiving payments, and integrate FX infrastructure into fintech, marketplace, and enterprise platforms.
use_cases: Managing FX conversion and cross-border payments from treasury automation agents
Handling international beneficiary payments from global AP agents
Accessing FX rate locking and hedging from currency risk management agents
Integrating embedded FX into fintech platforms from embedded finance agents
not_for: Domestic-only payments without FX and cross-border requirements
Consumer retail FX without B2B embedded finance focus
Low-volume casual FX without API integration investment
best_when: A fintech, marketplace, or enterprise using Currencycloud wants AI agents to automate FX quoting and execution, international payments, beneficiary management, settlement reconciliation, and embedded FX workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: FX and cross-border payment automation involves real currency transactions — FX rate execution is irreversible. Beneficiary banking detail automation must validate IBAN/SWIFT accuracy before payment. AML/OFAC sanctions screening required for all international beneficiaries. FX rate hedging automation requires financial expertise.

auth.notes: Currencycloud uses API key + login token authentication. Account login generates session token; API key used for initial auth. Developer portal with comprehensive documentation. Webhooks for payment and FX events. SDKs for Ruby, PHP, Python, Java, Node.js, .NET. Sandbox environment available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — transaction and FX margin fees
pricing.paid_tiers: FX margin and payment fees; volume-based pricing for enterprise
pricing.notes: London, UK. Subsidiary of Visa (acquired 2021 for $962M). Founded 2007. Global B2B FX and payment infrastructure. $100B+ annual payment volume. Used by 500+ fintech and enterprise clients including Revolut and Starling Bank. Strong embedded finance heritage. Competes with Wise Business and Airwallex for B2B FX.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; FX quote expiry requires prompt execution

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: FX rate execution is irreversible — lock rates only when ready to execute; handle expiry gracefully
Session token management — API key generates session tokens with expiry; agent must handle token refresh
No public MCP server — REST API with multi-language SDKs and developer portal
AML/OFAC for all international beneficiaries — Currencycloud performs compliance checks but agents must not bypass
Beneficiary validation — IBAN and SWIFT/BIC validation must precede payment initiation to prevent misdirected funds
Visa acquisition (2021) — verify ongoing product strategy and API evolution under Visa ownership
agent_readiness.security_notes: FX and cross-border payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR, AML, FCA. API key + session token. UK/EU/US. Currency transaction irreversibility and AML compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: FX and cross-border payments. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR, FCA. API key. UK/EU/US. Currency and beneficiary data security.
